positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a whimsical forest path leading to a glowing archway. The style should be a vibrant, sophisticated linocut illustration mixed with subtle watercolor washes. Composition must feature strong symmetry and negative space. Main elements include silhouetted, stylized flora (ferns, abstract trees) and fantastical, bioluminescent butterflies floating around the central path. Color palette: deep sapphire blues, forest emerald greens, pops of luminous gold, and creamy off-white highlights. Use dramatic backlighting to create strong contrasts and clean edges suitable for repeat patterning. Vector art aesthetic with high detail, centered composition, highly detailed, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, artifact, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, dirty, ugly, low contrast, monochrome only
